Change Schoology Notifications Settings

✍️ Made by Jon F.

→

Go to Home | Schoology

https://isd742.schoology.com/home

1

Click the "Jonathan Froelich" button

2

Click the "Settings" link

→

Go to Account | Schoology

https://isd742.schoology.com/settings/account

3

Click the "Notifications" link

→

Go to Account | Schoology

https://isd742.schoology.com/settings/notifications

4

Click the "On" link

5

Click the "Off" link

6

Type into the "Save Changes" submit

Made with StepSnap
